Tests.Title: Ensure Administrative accounts are cloud-only
Tests.Name: CIS.M365.1.1.1: Ensure Administrative accounts are cloud-only

ResultDetail.TestDescription:
1.1.1 (L1) Ensure Administrative accounts are cloud-only

#### Remediation action:

1. Navigate to Entra admin center > Users
2. Filter for admin roles
3. Ensure all admin accounts are cloud-only.
ResultDetail.TestTitle: CIS.M365.1.1.1: Ensure Administrative accounts are cloud-only
ResultDetail.TestResult: Well done! All admin accounts are cloud-only.

Tests.Title: Ensure that only organizationally managed/approved public groups exist
Tests.Name: CIS.M365.1.2.1: Ensure that only organizationally managed/approved public groups exist

Exception.Message: Expected $true, because 365 groups are private, but got $false.

ResultDetail.TestDescription:
1.2.1 (L2) Ensure that only organizationally managed/approved public groups exist

#### Remediation action:

1. Navigate to Microsoft 365 admin center.
2. Review and convert public groups to private.
ResultDetail.TestTitle: CIS.M365.1.2.1: Ensure that only organizationally managed/approved public groups exist
ResultDetail.TestResult:
Your tenant has 3 public 365 groups:

| Display Name | Group Public |
| --- | --- |
| All Company | Fail |
| Test Group | Fail |
| Demo LLC | Fail |

Tests.Title: Phishing-resistant MFA SHALL be enforced for all users.
Tests.Name: CISA.MS.AAD.3.1: Phishing-resistant MFA SHALL be enforced for all users.

Exception.Message: Expected $true, because phishing-resistant MFA is required for all users, but got $false.

ResultDetail.TestDescription:
MS.AAD.3.1v1: MFA SHALL be required for all users.

#### Remediation action:

Configure Conditional Access to require MFA for all users.
ResultDetail.TestTitle: CISA.MS.AAD.3.1: MFA SHALL be required for all users
ResultDetail.TestResult: No conditional access policy found requiring MFA for all users.

Tests.Title: A DMARC policy SHALL be published for every second-level domain.
Tests.Name: CISA.MS.EXO.4.1: A DMARC policy SHALL be published for every second-level domain.

Exception.Message: Expected $true, because DMARC is published, but got $false.

ResultDetail.TestDescription:
MS.EXO.4.1v1: A DMARC policy SHALL be published for every second-level domain.

#### Remediation action:

Publish a DMARC record for all second-level domains used by Exchange Online.
ResultDetail.TestTitle: CISA.MS.EXO.4.1: A DMARC policy SHALL be published for every second-level domain
ResultDetail.TestResult: DMARC is not published for 2 of 3 domains.

Tests.Title: At least one Conditional Access policy SHALL be configured
Tests.Name: MT.1001: At least one Conditional Access policy SHALL be configured

ResultDetail.TestDescription: At least one Conditional Access policy must be configured in the tenant.
ResultDetail.TestTitle: MT.1001: At least one Conditional Access policy SHALL be configured

Tests.Title: All Conditional Access policies are configured to exclude at least one emergency/break glass account
Tests.Name: MT.1005: All Conditional Access policies are configured to exclude at least one emergency/break glass account

Exception.Message: Expected $true, because all CA policies exclude emergency accounts, but got $false.

ResultDetail.TestDescription:
All Conditional Access policies should exclude at least one emergency/break glass account.

#### Remediation action:

Exclude emergency access accounts from all CA policies.
ResultDetail.TestTitle: MT.1005: All CA policies exclude emergency/break glass accounts
ResultDetail.TestResult: 3 of 12 policies do not exclude emergency accounts.

Tests.Title: Safe Links Policies are tracking when users click through to URLs
Tests.Name: ORCA.118: Safe Links Policies are tracking when users click through to URLs

ResultDetail.TestDescription: Safe Links policies should track URL clicks.
ResultDetail.TestResult: Safe Links click tracking is enabled.

Tests.Title: Conditional Access policy - Block legacy authentication
Tests.Name: MT.1033.0: Conditional Access policy - Block legacy authentication

Exception.Message: Insufficient privileges to complete the operation.

ResultDetail.SkippedReason: Insufficient privileges to complete the operation.
ResultDetail.TestDescription: A Conditional Access policy should block legacy authentication protocols.

Tests.Title: Ensure that DKIM is enabled for all Exchange Online Domains
Tests.Name: CIS.M365.2.1.9: Ensure that DKIM is enabled for all Exchange Online Domains

ResultDetail.SkippedReason: Exchange Online connection not available. Connect with Connect-ExchangeOnline.
ResultDetail.TestDescription:
2.1.9 (L1) Ensure the connection filter safe list is empty.

#### Remediation action:

Remove all IP addresses from the Exchange Online connection filter safe list.
ResultDetail.TestTitle: CIS.M365.2.1.9: Ensure the connection filter safe list is empty
ResultDetail.TestResult: Skipped. Exchange Online connection not available.

Tests.Title: Zero-hour auto purge (ZAP) for phishing is enabled
Tests.Name: ORCA.223: Zero-hour auto purge (ZAP) for phishing is enabled

ResultDetail.TestDescription: ZAP for phishing should be enabled in anti-phishing policies.

Tests.Title: Ensure users can report security concerns in Teams
Tests.Name: CIS.M365.8.6.1: Ensure users can report security concerns in Teams

Exception.Message: Expected $true, because users can report security concerns, but got $false.

ResultDetail.TestDescription:
8.6.1 (L1) Ensure users can report security concerns in Teams.

#### Remediation action:

Enable the 'Report a security concern' option in Teams admin center.
ResultDetail.TestTitle: CIS.M365.8.6.1: Ensure users can report security concerns in Teams
ResultDetail.TestResult: User reporting is not enabled in Teams.
